description_long: This object is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, featuring a tall, rectangular structure with a slightly curved front profile. The cabinet is predominantly deep blue with thin yellow trim outlining its edges, giving it a bold and clean appearance. The front face includes a large, flat display screen set within a blue bezel, and a control panel below it equipped with a single joystick and six round buttons arranged in two rows. The control panel is slightly angled for ergonomic access, and the buttons are colored red and blue, with the joystick topped by a red ball. The sides and back of the cabinet are plain, with no visible graphics or artwork. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of arcade machines found in public entertainment spaces.
description: A tall, deep blue arcade game cabinet with yellow trim, a large screen, and a control panel featuring a joystick and six colored buttons. The sides are plain and the design is classic and functional.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cabinet's tall, rectangular profile with a curved front and plain blue side panel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the large screen, blue bezel, and control panel with a joystick and six colored buttons.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the left side with a plain blue panel and visible control panel angle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a flat, featureless blue back panel with yellow trim.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single joystick on the left, six round buttons in two rows to the right, colored red and blue, single-player layout.
